mnemonics.title: OSI Layer Order
mnemonics.content: All People Seem To Need Data Processing (Application, Presentation, Session, Transport, Network, Data Link, Physical)

acronyms.usage: Different names at different layers: Segments (Transport), Packets (Network), Frames (Data Link)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine Russian dolls - each layer wraps the PDU with its own header

analogies.analogy: Like postal system: Application=Writer, Presentation=Translator, Session=Mailroom clerk, Transport=Post office sorter, Network=Address reader, Data Link=Truck driver, Physical=Highway
